title: Chapter 30
content:
Chapter 30: Chapter 30: ’M-my...Body Is Heating Up Again. I-i Need To Stop This Madness Now!

Husband: "Is that so? Then it’s fine, I’ll just call her back tomorrow. So, how has life been treating you in the village? Have you found what you love to do yet?"

"Yes Dad, I’ve definitely found what I love. In fact, it’s right next to me at this very moment."

Owen fondled her bare ass cheeks, smiling from ear to ear at the ridiculous question his father had just asked!

Pitiful for him the world is slowly turning into shit because of his son.

’Oh man... the thing I love is your wife, hehe...’ He barely managed to suppress his laughter.

[ Hell...We don’t have to be a villain and we don’t need one. Just act and follow your script! ]!

Owen ignored the system’s bashing...she’s just a hater.

As long as there was no actual penalty, he was going to do whatever he pleased.

Besides, the punishments so far were more or less just teasing nudges from the system to keep him working hard.

Now that he was shattering all of its expectations, he felt entirely free to explore his options and push every boundary to the limit.

Thankfully, his system wasn’t genuinely malicious, or else he would have bored himself to death.

The typical cliches he had read about in other web novels were so repetitive, making him incredibly glad that his own system was tailored to his liking...a supportive partner in crime!

Though...quite a hater at some point.

But it’s that’s how a relationship should work, if there’s trouble then prepare to make it triple!

Husband: "Ohh!! That’s wonderful to hear. You’re turning into a truly mature man now, Owen. I’m proud of you, son."

Spank!

Owen slapped Arielle’s ass once more as his grin widened, stretching nearly to his ears.

"Yes, Dad... thank you." Owen finally stood up; it was time for him to move on.

Husband: "Haha, then I’ve gotta go, son. Tell your mom to get some rest early."

Beep... tut... tut... tut...

The call disconnected as Owen stepped out of the bedroom.

As for actually doing the deed with her, he didn’t have any plans to rush it tonight.

He had given his word not to look at her forbidden fruit yet, so he needed to rein in his "Wakong" staff for now...

It’s a Dao to become a great sage after all.

Well, as wicked as he was, he would simply demand his proper payment with interest tomorrow after giving her such intense pleasure!

"I guess my hand will have to do the work for tonight." Owen glanced down at his lower half, realizing it wouldn’t be receiving a blowjob or a handjob this evening.

He walked back to his own bedroom to take care of his own business.

***

Yawn...

"Ohh... what a fantastic sleep!" Owen woke up with a refreshed smile plastered across his face.

His self-service had lasted for nearly an hour before he finally drifted off to sleep.

He stood up and pushed the window open, letting the bright morning sunlight illuminate the space.

It was a perfect day to get back to work.

"Now, let’s take a look at my progress."

"Status."

Host: Owen Dicke

Age: 23 years old

Level: 7 (25/68)

MILF Token: 31

Skills:

Golden Fingers (SSS Rank)

Smooth Talker (SSS Rank)

MILF Tamer! (SSS+ Rank)

Divine Cock! (SSS+ Rank)

Shop: [ Locked...reach level 10 to unlock!]

Tamed Milf: None

’Hmm... I don’t even know how I managed to hoard such a massive amount of tokens, but I’m definitely not complaining.’ Owen stared at the sudden influx of MILF Token.

Ding!

[ Due to the Quest updates from time to time the system allocated the token directly.]

’Ohh...that’s it.’

[ "That’s it" my Ass! You are just a lazy fucker...now touch some grass bastard.]

’Bad-tempered right in the morning? You will die early system~’ Owen teased...it’s already common, yes...it is.

As for the updates he was really tired of reading those...just some minor updates so he didn’t dwell on them that much.

That’s why he had completely lost track of the rewarded by the quests since he hadn’t bothered to read through all the changes...as he was too focused on the bigger picture.

He had simply focused on performing the deeds until it was completed, so receiving a whopping 26 tokens at once was a highly pleasant surprise.

’I’m not that bad to earn more, it’s good and that’s all matter’s.’

"Time to get moving... let’s make today even more productive." It was time to head out and touch some grass again, but before doing that, he needed to check if Arielle was already awake.

...

"Good morning, Mom..." Owen walked straight up behind her, wrapping his arms around her waist for a passionate back hug while she was busy preparing things in the kitchen.

"G-good morning, my dear Owen... d-did you sleep well?" She was too self-conscious to turn her head, so she kept her focus on her tasks, her voice laced with clear hesitation.

The deed that happened last night is like a videotape in her head... It’s repeatedly playing in her mind again and again.

"Of course, Mom. How about you? Did you rest well?" Owen rested his chin on her shoulder, whispering against her ear and forcing her to pause what she was doing.

How could she possibly act normal when she had literally squirted right in front of her own son?

"O-of course... my body feels incredibly light." She stretched slightly, attempting to prove to him that she was perfectly fine.

’M-my...body is heating up again. I need to stop this madness now!" Her thoughts spiraled like a rollercoaster.

"Then... that’s wonderful to hear." Owen finally let go of her waist, pivoting on his heel to turn around...and raised his hands.

Spank!

" Ughnnn...but, I can’t!.’ her shield crumbled like a sandcastle that was submerged as the big waves came knocking at her...

Though...it’s her busty plump marshmallow ass, instead of sandcastle.
